scenarios.title: Manual Init Login
scenarios.description: Configures the app via manualInit with mock server, logs in with password, verifies authenticated state.

scenarios.title: Session Restore After Terminate
scenarios.description: Logs in, terminates app, relaunches without reset — verifies session persists in the same region.

scenarios.title: Logout Returns to Login
scenarios.description: Logs in, taps logout, verifies login page is shown.

scenarios.title: Logout and Re-login in Same Region
scenarios.description: Full logout/re-login cycle — verifies region context is maintained.

scenarios.title: Expired Token Refresh on Relaunch
scenarios.description: Logs in with short-lived token, waits for expiry, relaunches — verifies token refresh keeps user authenticated.

scenarios.title: Entitlements Load After Login
scenarios.description: Logs in, taps Load Entitlements, verifies load completes.

scenarios.title: Cold Launch Shows Login
scenarios.description: Fresh launch with reset — verifies login page appears when no session exists.

scenarios.title: Multiple Launch Cycles Stability
scenarios.description: Logs in, then terminates and relaunches twice — verifies session survives multiple cycles.

scenarios.title: Logout clears session so relaunch shows login
scenarios.description: Logs in, logs out, terminates, relaunches without reset, and verifies the login page appears (keychain cleared by logout).

scenarios.title: Relaunch with connection drops recovers session
scenarios.description: Logs in, terminates, queues connection drops on refresh endpoints, relaunches, and verifies the session recovers.

scenarios.title: Token refresh keeps session alive
scenarios.description: Logs in with a very short access token TTL, waits for refresh to fire, and verifies the session remains alive.
